title: Accordion
description: A vertically stacked set of interactive headings that each reveal a section of content.

manual.title: Copy the component code
manual.description: Create a new file and paste the accordion component code.

usage.import: import { Accordion, AccordionContent, AccordionItem, AccordionTrigger } from '@repo/components';

examples.title: Default
examples.description: A single-open accordion with collapsible items.

examples.title: Multiple Items Open
examples.description: Allow multiple sections to stay open at the same time.
